DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (e.g. from Neon, Supabase, or Railway)

NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: Random 32-character secret for NextAuth session signing (run: openssl rand -base64 32)

NEXTAUTH_URL.description: Full public URL of your deployment (set automatically by Vercel as VERCEL_URL)

NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Same as NEXTAUTH_URL – the public URL of your deployment
